subcodes.first_line: Praised be Thou O Lord, My God! This is My mother who hath acknowledged Thy oneness, confessed Thy unity, attained the honour of meeting Thy Manifestations in Thy days
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی هذه امی التی اقرت بفردانیتک و اعترفت بسلطان احدیتک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for parents, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @nearness and remoteness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
